creator: lbartoletti@FreeBSD.org
text:
I can confirm that igc hangs on my ASUS ROG STRIX X670E-A GAMING WIFI motherboard.

I don't know why, sometimes with big downloads (pkg install, download, etc) sometimes without raeson...

I have patched bios/motherboard/etc to latest versions...

However, as mentioned in a comment, disabling aspm in the bios is a solution ; at least since 2 days it's not hanging.
